summary: Comprehensive testing of Iteration 3 features completed. All 20 backend tests pass, all frontend features verified. Services page redesign (sidebar with 21 sessions + chevrons, 'Claim your Personal space' header, uppercase title, dark rounded CTA), Admin panel enhanced program form (program_type, offer prices, is_upcoming, start_date fields), Upcoming Programs section correctly hidden when no programs are marked upcoming.
critical_code_review_comments: All new program fields (program_type, offer_price_usd/inr, offer_text, is_upcoming, start_date) properly integrated
Services page sidebar correctly displays 21 sessions with chevron arrows
Upcoming Programs section conditionally renders only when programs have is_upcoming=true
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Database has: 6 programs (none marked is_upcoming), 21 sessions, 44 testimonials (32 graphic + 12 video)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 3 features tested and working. Services page: /services has sidebar with 21 sessions and chevron arrows, clicking changes right panel content, 'Claim your Personal space' header overlay on image, session title in UPPERCASE, dark rounded 'VIEW DETAILS & BOOK' button navigates to /session/{id}. Admin panel: Programs tab edit form has new fields - Program Type dropdown (online/offline/hybrid), Offer Price USD/INR, Offer Badge Text, Start Date, 'Show in Upcoming Programs section' toggle. All programs currently have is_upcoming=false, so Homepage Upcoming Programs section is hidden. To test upcoming section, mark a program is_upcoming=true via admin. API filters: GET /api/programs?upcoming_only=true returns empty array, GET /api/programs?visible_only=true returns 6 programs.
